recommendations.issue: App.tsx is a 30KB monolith (~780 lines) containing auth gate, header (mobile+desktop), filter bar, day grid, modals, and all state management inline
recommendations.recommendation: Extract into focused components: AuthGate, AppHeader, MobileHeader, DesktopHeader, StatsCards, SessionCard, SyncStatus, FilterBar, DayGrid, BottomPanels. App.tsx should be <100 lines of composition only.

recommendations.issue: No reusable UI primitive library — Button, Card, Input, Modal are styled inline with repeated Tailwind classes
recommendations.recommendation: Create src/components/ui/ with Button, Card, Input, Select, Textarea, Modal, Toast, Tooltip, Dropdown, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Skeleton, EmptyState, Toggle, Tabs, IconButton components

recommendations.issue: No focus trapping in modals (TaskEditModal, FilePreviewModal, AIAssistant). Escape handler exists but focus is not trapped.
recommendations.recommendation: Implement useFocusTrap hook and apply to all modal/panel components. Add focus restoration on close.

recommendations.issue: Missing skip-to-content link, no landmark roles (main, nav, banner), heading hierarchy has gaps
recommendations.recommendation: Add Skip to content as first element. Add role='main', role='banner', role='complementary'. Fix heading hierarchy.

recommendations.issue: Some interactive elements have insufficient touch targets (<44px). Small icon buttons (p-1.5 = ~30px) fail WCAG.
recommendations.recommendation: Ensure all touch targets are minimum 44x44px. Use min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px] on mobile.

recommendations.issue: TaskEditModal uses bottom-sheet pattern on mobile (good) but lacks drag-to-dismiss handle gesture. No swipe gestures on task rows.
recommendations.recommendation: Add drag-to-dismiss on TaskEditModal. Implement swipe-right-to-complete and swipe-left-to-delete gestures on TaskRow. Add FAB for quick task creation.

recommendations.issue: Only auth loading has a spinner. No skeleton states for plan loading, no error boundaries, no empty states with helpful illustrations
recommendations.recommendation: Add Skeleton components for plan loading state. Add EmptyState with illustrations for empty days. Add error boundary with retry. Add toast notifications for errors.

recommendations.issue: Inconsistent spacing values: mix of px-2, px-3, px-4, px-5, px-6, px-8 without a clear scale. Gap values vary (gap-1.5, gap-2, gap-2.5, gap-3, gap-4, gap-5, gap-6, gap-8)
recommendations.recommendation: Define a strict 4px spacing scale in design tokens. Standardize: xs=4px, sm=8px, md=12px, lg=16px, xl=24px, 2xl=32px, 3xl=48px. Apply consistently.

recommendations.issue: Font sizes are inconsistent: text-[8px], text-[9px], text-[10px], text-[11px], text-[12px], text-[13px], text-[15px] arbitrary values. No clear type scale.
recommendations.recommendation: Define typography scale tokens: caption=10px, body-sm=12px, body=14px, body-lg=16px, heading-sm=18px, heading=24px, heading-lg=32px, display=40px

recommendations.issue: Glass panel styles duplicated across components. btn-primary and btn-ghost defined in CSS but not as React components. Badge component exists but many badges are inline-styled.
recommendations.recommendation: Consolidate all UI patterns into the component library. Replace inline glass-panel divs with Card component. Replace inline buttons with Button component.

recommendations.issue: Good foundation with shimmer, gradientShift, fadeIn, scaleIn keyframes. But no staggered list animations, no completion celebration, no page transitions.
recommendations.recommendation: Add staggered animations for task list expand (stagger 50ms per item). Add confetti/checkmark animation on task completion. Add smooth view transitions.

recommendations.issue: Good accent color system (indigo/violet) but neutral colors use magic numbers: white/[0.04], white/[0.06], white/[0.08], etc. Hard to maintain consistency.
recommendations.recommendation: Define surface overlay tokens: overlay-subtle=white/[0.02], overlay-light=white/[0.04], overlay-medium=white/[0.08], overlay-strong=white/[0.12]. Use semantic names.

recommendations.issue: No bottom navigation for mobile. Mobile users must scroll to access AI assistant, team panel, and reminders.
recommendations.recommendation: Add mobile bottom tab bar with: Hafta (calendar), Takım (users), AI (bot), Notlar (notes) navigation. Collapse into tabbed views on mobile.

recommendations.issue: No keyboard shortcut system. / for search exists but no discoverable overlay. No Ctrl+N for new task.
recommendations.recommendation: Implement useKeyboardShortcuts hook. Add keyboard shortcut overlay on ? key press. Support: / search, Ctrl+N new task, Escape close modal, Arrow keys in lists.

recommendations.issue: prefers-reduced-motion support exists but only zeros out durations. No fallback behavior defined.
recommendations.recommendation: Keep reduced-motion support. Add instant-transition fallback so state changes still feel responsive without animation.

topImprovements: 1. REFACTOR APP.TSX MONOLITH: Break 30KB App.tsx into focused components (AuthGate, AppHeader, FilterBar, DayGrid). Critical for maintainability.
2. BUILD COMPONENT LIBRARY: Create src/components/ui/ with Button, Card, Input, Modal, Toast, Skeleton, etc. Eliminates style duplication.
3. ADD FOCUS TRAPPING: Implement useFocusTrap for modals and panels. Major accessibility gap.
4. SKELETON LOADING STATES: Add skeleton screens for plan loading and empty states with illustrations. Currently jarring transitions.
5. MOBILE SWIPE GESTURES: Swipe-to-complete and swipe-to-delete on TaskRow. Bottom sheet drag-to-dismiss. Essential for mobile UX.
6. STANDARDIZE SPACING/TYPOGRAPHY: Define strict design token scales. Currently using 15+ arbitrary pixel values for fonts.
7. ADD TOAST NOTIFICATION SYSTEM: Replace window.alert() calls with proper toast notifications with undo support.
8. KEYBOARD NAVIGATION & SHORTCUTS: Full keyboard nav with discoverable shortcut overlay. Add focus management.
9. MOBILE BOTTOM NAVIGATION: Add tab bar for mobile with Hafta/Takım/AI/Notlar sections.
10. MICRO-ANIMATIONS: Staggered list animations, task completion celebration, smooth view transitions. Polish to premium level.
